texto: Innocent? Tell me human, who among you is innocent? Who among you has not destroyed without need or hurt without pity? Should a lion ponder his role in thinning the herds? Does he question whether or not he is doing the right thing as he tears into a zebra’s flesh?” he snarled. His next words were slow and measured, and more to himself than to Natalya. “No….he knows only that he has teeth and claws….and an insatiable lust for blood.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jessica Majzner que provoca temas ligados a sabedoria. Ao questionar “Innocent? Tell me human, who among you is innocent? Who among you has not destroyed without need …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sabedoria, vampire, villain, com foco em natal e villain.
